title: galium ephedroides
intro: Galium ephedroides, also known as Ephedran or Desert Centaury, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to the southwestern regions of the United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a diaphoretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory, making it useful for relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Galium ephedroides offers several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating congestion, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with other medications.
